Title: Classic Sweet Italian Sausage
Description:
The original recipe since 1945. Abruzzo-style — cracked black pepper, the Sulmona family spice blend, and no fennel or garlic. The same sausage Pittsburgh has been lining up for at the counter for eighty years.

Mild, savory, and balanced — lighter and more aromatic than the typical American Italian sausage, the way it's made in Sulmona. Perfect for Sunday gravy, sausage and peppers, on the grill, or crumbled into pasta. We hand-stuff every link in McKees Rocks and ship it frozen so it arrives at your door tasting like the case at the shop.

Weight: 3 lbs · Fresh-frozen for shipping

Ingredients: Pork, water, salt, black pepper, paprika, family spice blend. Natural casing. No fennel, no garlic, no fillers, no MSG, no artificial preservatives.

Title: Hot Italian Sausage
Description:
Same family recipe, with crushed red pepper. A Pittsburgh staple for Sunday sauce, the grill, and any sandwich worth eating.

Hot but not punishing — the heat builds slow, the way an Italian grandmother would have made it. Pat McAfee's pick on ESPN GameDay. The hot sausage we put in our famous sandwich since 1945.

Title: Homemade Italian Meatballs
Description:
Lil's recipe. Hand-rolled, seasoned with the family spice blend, made the way they're made at the counter every morning.

Tender, well-seasoned, never dense. Beef, pork, ricotta, parmesan, fresh parsley, garlic, breadcrumbs — the way an Italian household makes them when they expect you for dinner. We roll every meatball by hand in McKees Rocks.

Weight: 2 lbs · ~16 meatballs at 2 oz each

Ingredients: Beef, pork, ricotta, parmesan, eggs, breadcrumbs, garlic, parsley, salt, black pepper, family spice blend.
